info.title: REST API - COMET LIVE - PROD POSTGRESQL
info.description: COMET LIVE Backend REST API for real-time use in frontend applications such as COMET LIVE iOS and Android Apps

tags.name: Competition Data API for Live Apps
tags.description: API for querying Competition, Match and Statistical Data from COMET

tags.name: Account management api for mobile application
Utility API for Live Web Apps
tags.description: API for utility functions, such as search

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: List of teams underneath a specific club

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the club/team, e.g. 823567

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It returns the data if the team belongs to organization's hierarchy or it participates in the competition organized by the organization.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It returns the data if the team belongs to the team's hierarchy.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: List of matches of a specific club/team in the past, with all today's matches included. List is ordered by dateTimeUTC of the match descending. Attribute 'allowDetail' defines if the caller has permission to call match details endpoints for the match

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the club/team, e.g. 823567

parameters.name: utcOffset
parameters.description: Offset from UTC in hours e.g. 2 or -7

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: page to retrieve (starts from 1)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: size of the page

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It will return the data only if the team belongs to organization's hierarchy or it participates in the competition organized by the organization.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will return the data only if the team belongs to the team's hierarchy.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: List of matches of a specific club/team in the future, excluding all today's matches. List is ordered by dateTimeUTC of the match ascending.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the club/team, e.g. 823567

parameters.name: utcOffset
parameters.description: Offset from UTC in hours e.g. 2 or -7

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: page to retrieve (starts from 1)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: size of the page

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It will return the data only if the team belongs to organization's hierarchy or it participates in the competition organized by the organization.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will return the data only if the team belongs to the team's hierarchy.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It returns the data if the team belongs to organization's hierarchy or it participates in the competition organized by the organization.

tags: Utility API for Live Web Apps
get.summary: Endpoint used for searching the clubs/teams

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: search string

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: page to retrieve

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: size of the page

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization. It will filter only teams that belong to the organization or participate in their competitions.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

        {
            "id": 41001,
            "fifaId": "105KJ8A",

    "size": 21
}

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter

parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: Statistics of an individual player, grouped by competitions where the player had appearances. Attribute 'allowDetail' defines if the caller has permission to call competition details endpoints for the competition

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the player, e.g. 443275

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the club/team to filter matches for stats, e.g. 823567

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: List of match appearances for a specific player. The list is ordered by dateTimeUTC of the match. Attribute 'allowDetail' defines if the caller has permission to call match details endpoints for the match

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the player, e.g. 443275

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: page to retrieve (starts from 1)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: size of the page

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It filters matches and shows only the ones where the player played for the team.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: List of match appearances for a specific player. The list is ordered by dateTimeUTC of the match. Attribute 'allowDetail' defines if the caller has permission to call match details endpoints for the match

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the player, e.g. 443275

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the team to filter the matches, e.g. 112233

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: page to retrieve (starts from 1)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: size of the page

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It filters matches and shows only the ones where the player played for the team.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: Single representation of an individual player

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the player, e.g. 443275

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It will return the data if the player has any (active or inactive) registration to a team of the organization or has any appearance on the competition organized by organization.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will return the data only if the player has a registration for the team (active or inactive)

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Utility API for Live Web Apps
get.summary: Endpoint used for searching the players

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: search string

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: page to retrieve

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: size of the page

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization. It will filter players that had any registration for a club below the organization or he participated in at least one match organized by the organization.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will filter players that had any registration for a club at any point in his career.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: Single representation of an individual player by FIFA ID

parameters.name: fifaId
parameters.description: FIFA ID of the player, e.g. 12HENE7

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It will return the data if the player has any (active or inactive) registration to a team of the organization or has any appearance on the competition organized by organization.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will return the data only if the player has a registration for the team (active or inactive)

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Account management api for mobile application
get.summary: Reading news source and returning JSON representation
get.description: Returns list of news sources configured for given device

parameters.name: newsSourceId
parameters.description: ID of the news source. This is the ID of the news source found in endpoint /device/{deviceId}/newsSources

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.summary: List of Matches on a Specific Day
get.description: List of matches on a specific day in a specific timezone. Matches are ordered by organization type, competition rank, age category, competition name, competition id, match date/time and match order number. Response is in lite format

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Start date of the match in yyyyMMdd format, e.g. 20210712

parameters.name: utcOffset
parameters.description: Offset from UTC in hours e.g. 2 or -7

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization. It will filter matches from the competitions that are organized by given organization or organizations below.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will filter matches of the given team/club or teams below.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: List of matches currently being played and managed in live mode. Matches are ordered by organization type, competition rank, age category, competition name, competition id, match date/time and match order number

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It will filter matches from the competitions that are organized by given organization or organizations below.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will filter matches of the given team/club or teams below.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.summary: List of Matches on a Specific Day
get.description: List of matches on a specific day in a specific timezone. Matches are ordered by organization type, competition rank, age category, competition name, competition id, match date/time and match order number. Response includes geolocation of matches.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Start date of the match in yyyyMMdd format, e.g. 20210712

parameters.name: utcOffset
parameters.description: Offset from UTC in hours e.g. 2 or -7

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It will filter matches from the competitions that are organized by given organization or organizations below.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID It will filter matches of the given team/club or teams below.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: Team standings on the match's competition. It is the unofficial standings. If team is playing match at the moment in live mode, there will be a sign of how it's doing in the match (W/D/L). Both teams will have highlight set to true so that mobile app can highlight teams that are playing in this match.

parameters.name: matchId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the match, e.g. 443251

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It will return the data only if the competition is organized by the given organization or organizations below.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will return the data only if the team is participating in the match.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: Lineups for both clubs/teams in a specific match. The player will have ID if the caller can call the player details endpoint

parameters.name: matchId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the match, e.g. 443251

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It will return the data only if the competition is organized by the given organization or organizations below.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will return the data only if the team is participating in the match.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: Single representation of a specific match, with standard match information

parameters.name: matchId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the match, e.g. 443251

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It will return the match if the competition is organized by the given organization or organizations below.

parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will return the match if the team or it's child is participating in the match.

parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: List of teams participating in the competition. Used for filtering statistics

parameters.name: competitionId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the competition, e.g. 325433

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It will return the data only if the competition is organized by the given organization or organizations below.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will return the data only if the team is participating in the competition or it's elements.

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: Unofficial table of clubs/teams for a specific competition, including matches that are not officialised, i.e. set to PLAYED status. If team is playing match at the moment in live mode, there will be a sign of how it's doing in the match (W/D/L)

parameters.name: competitionId
parameters.description: COMET ID of the competition, e.g. 325433

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It will return the data only if the competition is organized by the given organization or organizations below. Attribute allowDetail tells the client if it can call team details endpoints (team details, team matches events...). Value of the field depends on tenant/organizationIdFilter/teamIdFilter

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will return the data only if the team is participating in the competition or it's elements. Attribute allowDetail tells the client if it can call team details endpoints (team details, team matches events...). Value of the field depends on tenant/organizationIdFilter/teamIdFilter

parameters.name: API_KEY
parameters.description: Authorization access token

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description:
Language of the response used for translation of dynamic data like registration types, match phases etc.

Use the header on /api/live/{tenant}/preferences to check if the language is supported. It will return it in the response if it's supported otherwise the fallback language is returned in the response.
If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

tags: Competition Data API for Live Apps
get.description: Official table of clubs/teams for a specific competition. Only officialized (set to PLAYED status) matches are considered. get.description: List of matches of a specific competition in the past, with all today's matches included. List is ordered by dateTimeUTC of the match descending.

parameters.name: utcOffset
parameters.description: Offset from UTC in hours e.g. 2 or -7

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: page to retrieve (starts from 1)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: size of the page

parameters.name: organizationIdFilter
parameters.description: Organization ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by organization ID. It will return the data only if the competition is organized by the given organization or organizations below.

parameters.name: teamIdFilter
parameters.description: Team ID for filtering data. It is required if API_KEY is restricted by team ID. It will return the data only if the team is participating in the competition.

If the header is left blank (not included in the request) then the default language will be used.

message.description: Description of the error in human readable language

severity.description: Severity of the error. i.e. info/warn/error

type.description: Numerical representation of type of the error for some of the special error cases. i.e. 1 - Refresh, 2 - deactivated, 100 - Duplicate Device ID etc.

additionalProperties.description: Additional information from backend that the client can use to improve it's behaviour. i.e. if the error is duplicate notification id, the backend can send the old device id in this field.

additionalInfo.description: Additional information from backend that the client can use to improve it's behaviour. i.e. if the error is duplicate notification id, the backend can send the old device id in this field.

message.description: Error message. Deprecated, use messages instead.

ExceptionViewModel.description: Generic model for presenting error messages when request resulted in 4XX status code.

place.description: town or place in which the facility is situated

hasTeams.description: Indicates if there are child teams and should tab on club details with list of teams be shown

allowDetail.description: defines if caller is allowed to call team details endpoints (team details, team matches events...) Value of the field depends on tenant/organizationIdFilter/teamIdFilter

showStandings.description: defines if the competition has standings and should the user be able to see it

showGoalDifference.description: defines should the user be able to see goal difference

showStats.description: defines if the user should see stats tab or the privacy setting is prohibiting it

hasChildren.description: defines if the competition has child competitions

active.description: defines if the competition is active or inactive

homeTeamRedCards.description: number of red cards home team received. returned only if match is live

awayTeamRedCards.description: number of red cards away team received. returned only if match is live

liveStatus.description: specifies if the match will be covered with live updates and what is the status if yes. NULL for no live coverage or SCHEDULED, CANCELED, POSTPONED, RUNNING or PLAYED

dateTimeUTC.description: UTC date time of the start of the match

matchOrderNumber.description: match order number within a round

roundOrder.description: competition round numeric number to use when ordering matches

matchNumber.description: order number of the match within a competition

statusDescription.description: description of the status. This could be a reason for postponing a match

result.description: Used for player/club matches to identify result of the match for the player's team (Win, Draw or Lost)

team.description: Used for player/club matches to identify what side is the given player/team (Home or Away)

attendance.description: Number of spectators that were on the stadium watching the game

showEvents.description: defines if the user should see events or the privacy setting is prohibiting it

allowDetail.description: defines if caller is allowed to call match details endpoints (match details, match events, lineups, match info...)

size.description: Number of objects in the list

penalties.description: Goals scored from penalty kick during the match. Penalty shootout does not count here.

singleYellow.description: True if player received single yellow card

singleSinBin.description: True if player received single sin bin

red.description: True if player received direct red card on the match

secondYellow.description: True if player received second yellow card

secondSinBin.description: True if player received second sin bin

current.description: current result of the match. If the match is not yet started it can be null and not 0

regular.description: result of the match after regular time

half.description: result of the match after first half

extra.description: result of the match after extra time

penalties.description: result of the match after penalty shootout

penaltyWin.description: indicates if the team won on penalty

size.description: Number of objects in the list
Number of objects in the list

fullMatchesPlayed.description: Number of matches played from the start to the end

goals.description: Includes goals scored from penalties during the match

ownGoals.description: Number of goals scored from penalty kicks during the match. Penalty shootout goals excluded

captain.description: Number of times the player was the captain of the team

allowDetail.description: Defines if caller is allowed to call competition details endpoints

MatchAndTeamOfficial.description: Contains basic information about Match Officials and/or Team officials.

minute.description: minute of the eveant in the match phase

minuteFull.description: full minute of the event in the match

stoppageTime.description: stoppage time, if applicable, of the event

displayMinute.description: String representation of the minute, with stoppage time if applicable, and seconds if applicable

fcdName.example: GOAL, OWN_GOAL, PENALTY, YELLOW, SECOND_YELLOW, RED, SUBSTITUTION, TIME_OUT, ACCUMULATED_FOUL, SIX_METERS, TEN_METERS, EXPULSION, PENALTY_FAILED, PENALTY_SAVED, PENALTY_GOAL

position.description: in lineups it shows G for goalkeeper, and in player details it shows his position of play in domestic language.

age.description: Age of the player on today's date

hideProfile.description: Indicates whether player profile should be hidden, based on player privacy setting in COMET

size.description: Number of objects in the list

liveResult.description: If the team is playing live match, this is the sign if it's winning, loosing or draw

highlight.description: If team should be highlighted. When showing table on match, teams that play are highlighted. This will be true only on Match standings for the teams playing the match.

MatchInfo.description: Additional match info like team / match official kits and list of match officials

size.description: Number of objects in the list
